```{r}
# Load libraries

library(haven)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Load dataset
df <- read_dta("panel_final.dta")

# Match exact sample restrictions from Stata do-file
df <- df %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(gdp_per_capita),
    !is.na(energy_per_gdp)
  )

# Create exact same logged variables used in regressions
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    log_co2    = log(co2_per_capita),
    log_carbon = log(carbon_price + 1)
  )

# Create publication-style graph
p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = log_carbon, y = log_co2)) +
  
  geom_point(
    alpha = 0.20,
    size = 1.2,
    color = "darkcyan"
  ) +
  
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Figure 1. Carbon Pricing and CO₂ Emissions Per Capita",
    
    subtitle = "Cross-country panel observations (1990–2024)",
    
    x = "Log Carbon Price",
    
    y = "Log CO₂ Emissions Per Capita",
    
    caption = "Carbon price transformed as log(carbon_price + 1)."
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11),
    
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Display graph
print(p)

# Save high-quality figure
ggsave(
  "figure1_log_scatter.pdf",
  plot = p,
  width = 10,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
```



```{r}
df <- df %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(gdp_per_capita),
    !is.na(energy_per_gdp)
  )

# Create carbon pricing indicator
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    has_price = ifelse(carbon_price > 0, 1, 0)
  )

# Collapse to yearly averages by pricing status
trend_data <- df %>%
  group_by(year, has_price) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_co2 = mean(co2_per_capita, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Create labels
trend_data$group <- ifelse(
  trend_data$has_price == 1,
  "Countries with carbon price",
  "Countries without carbon price"
)

# Create improved figure
p2 <- ggplot(
  trend_data,
  aes(
    x = year,
    y = avg_co2,
    color = group
  )
) +

  geom_line(
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Figure 2. CO₂ Trends by Carbon Pricing Status",

    subtitle = "Average CO₂ emissions per capita across countries, 1990–2024",

    x = "Year",

    y = "Average CO₂ Emissions per Capita (tonnes)",

    color = NULL,

    caption = "Countries classified as carbon-priced if carbon_price > 0."
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Countries with carbon price" = "#FF7F0E",
      "Countries without carbon price" = "#1F77B4"
    )
  ) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(1990, 2025, 5)
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +

  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 20
    ),

    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 11
    ),

    axis.title = element_text(
      face = "bold"
    ),

    legend.position = "right",

    legend.text = element_text(
      size = 11
    ),

    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Display figure
print(p2)

# Save as high-quality PDF
ggsave(
  "figure2_trends.pdf",
  plot = p2,
  width = 10,
  height = 6
  
)
```
